caption: A man with short, styled dark hair and a light beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black long-sleeved shirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a professional condenser microphone mounted on a black boom arm, which is equipped with a pop filter. The background consists of dark, ribbed acoustic foam panels. Across the sequence, the man remains in a stationary position, but his facial expression shifts. He begins by looking slightly to the side with an expectant gaze, then closes his eyes briefly in a blink. He then opens his eyes and looks forward with a slight, neutral expression, eventually settling into a soft, attentive gaze toward the front. There is no on-screen text or logos visible.
